runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (24.09) over 407m at this track. Aided by the inside draw and is worth plenty of thought.

runners.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 3 length fourth (23.90) over 407m at this track. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

runners.formComment: In sparkling form, last time showing brilliant early pace and proving too slick around this track over 407m in 23.68, making it three wins on end. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

runners.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (23.74) over 407m at this track. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 407m in 24.07. Followed that up with a minor placing over 407m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week ago. Hard to recommend this time.

runners.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior she was an effortless winner scoring by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 at Townsville and recording a lightning 21.56 for the 380m journey. Has the ability and can find winning form again.
